message:
feat(rch): add queue command and doctor --dry-run option

New command:
- `rch queue`: Show build queue with active and waiting compilations
  - --watch (-w): Real-time updates (1s interval)
  - --json: Output for scripting
  - Shows running builds with worker/elapsed time, queued builds,
    and worker availability summary

Doctor improvements:
- --dry-run flag: Preview what would be fixed without making changes
- Combines with --fix: `rch doctor --fix --dry-run`

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
